title: Buildcraft StationAPI
description: Extending Minecraft with pipes, auto-crafting, quarries, engines and much more!
body:
This is a part port and part reimplementation of various [Buildcraft](https://github.com/BuildCraft/BuildCraft/tree/3.7.x) versions aiming for feature parity with Buildcraft for Minecraft r1.2.5 by SpaceToad and the Buildcraft Team, for Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 on the Babric toolchain and [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi)

---

Buildcraft adds various things for your automation desires including but not limited to:
* **Pipes** for transporting Items, Fluids and Energy
* **Auto-Crafting** for.. well.. automatically crafting stuff
* **Engines** for powering your factory
* **Gates** for more complex automation control
* **Quarries** for automatic mining
* **Builders and Fillers** for automatic building
* and much more!

![Various bits of machinery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97f1e49b3528521b552a2e344eae3d80233d7042.png)
